nodes.label: Audio In
nodes.description: Input audio signal at original sample rate

nodes.label: Upsample
nodes.description: JUCE dsp::Oversampling upsamples signal by configured factor (1x-16x)

nodes.label: Serial Child Chain
nodes.description: Children process serially at upsampled rate (sampleRate * factor, blockSize * factor)

nodes.label: Downsample
nodes.description: JUCE dsp::Oversampling downsamples signal back to original rate with anti-aliasing filter

nodes.label: Oversampling
nodes.description: Oversampling factor exponent (0=None/1x, 1=2x, 2=4x, 3=8x, 4=16x). Dynamic variant only.

nodes.label: Audio Out
nodes.description: Output audio signal at original sample rate
